meta.title: AI football predictions built on real data | BetsPlug
meta.description: AI football predictions for 30+ leagues using Elo ratings, Poisson models and machine learning. Every prediction locked before kickoff. Public track record.

hero.h1: AI football predictions built on {{accent}}real data{{/accent}}
hero.subheadline: Predictions for 30+ leagues using Elo ratings, Poisson models and machine learning. Every prediction locked before kickoff. Full track record public.

howItWorks.subhead: From match to pick in three steps. No tipsters, no hunches.

steps.body: We pull in fixtures and recent results from 30+ leagues. The data refreshes constantly so we always work with what just happened on the pitch.
For every upcoming match, our engine compares team strength, recent form and historical patterns. No editor, no fan bias — just numbers.
Each prediction is published and locked before the whistle. Once it's out, it cannot be changed. Wins and losses both stay on the public track record.

livePredictions.subhead: Free picks for today's matches, refreshed every minute. Locked before kickoff — exactly what our paying subscribers see.
livePredictions.emptyLabel: No matches scheduled for today — fresh slate every morning.

ctaSection.body: Subscribers see the full slate across every league we cover, with win probability per match.

paragraphs: Every pick on BetsPlug starts the same way: the engine looks at how strong each team is right now, how they've been playing lately, and what usually happens when these two sides — or sides like them — meet.
There's no editor, no favourite team and no last-minute gut call. The model treats every match the same way and turns the picture into a single, simple verdict with a confidence score.
We publish wins and losses side by side on a public track record. If a pick goes wrong, you can see it. That's the only honest way to do this.

trackRecord.body: Most prediction sites only show their winners. We publish everything — wins, losses, exact predictions and timestamps. Verify our track record yourself.

comparison.footnote: This isn't about AI being magic. It's about removing two things that hurt prediction accuracy: human bias and inconsistency.

pricing.subhead: Three plans. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.
pricing.guaranteeMicro: All plans: 7-day money-back guarantee on paid tiers

questions.a: No. BetsPlug is a data analytics platform. We do not accept bets, hold money, or facilitate gambling. We publish statistical predictions for educational and informational use.

questions.q: How accurate are AI football predictions?
questions.a: Accuracy varies per league, market and matchday. We publish every prediction — both wins and losses — in our public track record so you can verify performance yourself rather than rely on our claims.

questions.q: Can predictions be modified after publication?
questions.a: No. Every prediction is locked before kickoff with a public timestamp. Once published, it cannot be edited or removed. This is verifiable in our track record.

questions.q: What makes BetsPlug different from other tipster sites?
questions.a: Three things: AI-driven predictions (no human bias), full transparency (we publish losses too), and methodology you can inspect (Elo + Poisson + ML — not a 'secret algorithm').

questions.q: Do I need a betting account to use BetsPlug?
questions.a: No. BetsPlug is independent of any bookmaker. We provide statistical analysis only. What you do with that information is up to you.
Yes, anytime. All paid plans include a 7-day money-back guarantee. After that, cancel from your account dashboard with one click.

finalCta.body: Get 5 free predictions today. No credit card required.
